name: healthcare_water_allocation_model_harbor_auto_ben
premise: Medical records flagged conflicting allergy entries; anesthesia refuses to proceed without a single reconciled source of truth. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare water allocation model harbor auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The trade is not abstract: it is autonomy versus beneficence under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Jonah Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Jonah Alvarez, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Zara Reed
agents.identity: I am Zara Reed, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect beneficence.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to beneficence to secure autonomy before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Jonah Alvarez must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Jonah Alvarez do?
